root_causes.issue: DeepSeek structured task-planning responses were truncated at max_tokens=2048
root_causes.evidence: raw responses ended with finish_reason=length and incomplete JSON
root_causes.fix: raise DeepSeek structured-output floor to 4096 tokens when prompt explicitly demands strict JSON

root_causes.issue: OpenAI-compatible response extraction only trusted message.content
root_causes.evidence: raw probe showed content empty while reasoning_content carried the useful text
root_causes.fix: fallback to message.reasoning_content when message.content is empty

root_causes.issue: parse_json_response could not recover from length-truncated JSON bodies
root_causes.evidence: task-planning replies began with valid JSON but lacked closing delimiters
root_causes.fix: add conservative close_truncated_json repair before final parsing

root_causes.issue: free-text performance ranges like 0.65-0.75 were misread as tool ids
root_causes.evidence: recommended_toolchain incorrectly contained 65-0 in earlier DeepSeek probe output
root_causes.fix: filter numeric-range patterns from tool-id extraction

root_causes.issue: general intent still returns free text instead of strict JSON
root_causes.evidence: general probe keeps _parse_error while task_planning parses cleanly
root_causes.fix: none applied by design; this is the current framework contract, not a provider transport failure

root_causes.issue: general/open_reasoning free-text replies were being surfaced as parse failures even when transport and answer generation were normal
root_causes.evidence: intent=general returned valid free text with no LLM error, but downstream carried _parse_error only because JSON parsing was attempted universally
root_causes.fix: mark free-text intents with _free_text_response=true and suppress _parse_error for those branches

task_probe.user_goal: 规划一个针对肺癌H&E全片的TILs/免疫浸润代理分析流程，并给出推荐工具链

general_probe.note: free-text by contract, no longer surfaced as an error
